title: encelia sanguinea
intro: Encelia sanguinea, also known as Red Encelia or Red Hesperletta, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its vibrant red or yellow flowers and succulent leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce the severity of conditions such as fever and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Encelia sanguinea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable natural remedy for cardiovascular health and immune system support. Encelia sanguinea can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
